# Kenney UI Pack 2.0

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/ui-pack
- Downloaded: 2026-07-17
- License: Creative Commons Zero (CC0 1.0)
- Upstream package: `kenney_ui-pack.zip`

Only the three sprites used by this project are retained: the double-resolution
rectangle button, input/panel frame, and divider. The original license text is
included in `LICENSE.txt`.
